headline: Assessing Viatris (VTRS) Valuation After Its Recent Share Price Rebound
summary: Why Viatris Stock Is Back On Investors’ Radar Viatris (VTRS) has quietly drawn fresh attention after a strong recent run, with the stock up about 32% over the past month and roughly 19% in the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Viatris. At a share price of $17.39, Viatris has seen momentum build quickly, with a 9.03% 1 day share price return, 32.14% 30 day share price return and a 100.23% 1 year total shareholder return. The 5 year total shareholder return of 34.69% shows a more...
